content: Free backups are used first. Will be automatically renewed <1>on {{date}}</1>

comment.text: This key displays the renewal date for free backups. It appears on the Backup Page within the Portal Settings, informing users when their free backup allowance will automatically renew. The `<date>` variable should be replaced with the localized date format.

usage.context:
{!isFreeTariff ? (
 <Text className={styles.backupPaidInfo}>
 <Trans
 t={t}
 ns="Services"
 i18nKey="FreeBackupsRenewsDate"
 values={{
 date: formatDateLocalized(
 now()
 .setZone(window.timezone)
 .startOf("month")

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Pulsuz ehtiyatlar ilk istifadə olunur' translates to 'Free backups are used first', which is grammatically awkward and doesn't convey the intended meaning of 'Free backups are used up first' or 'Free backups are prioritized'. More importantly, 'on {{date}}' is translated as 'on {{date}}', but in Azerbaijani, the preposition 'on' (for dates) should be expressed via the locative case suffix or a different structure, and the literal word 'on' is not used for dates.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: İlk növbədə pulsuz ehtiyatlardan istifadə olunur. <1>{{date}} tarixində</1> avtomatik yenilənəcək

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'on' was not translated into Greek, leaving an English preposition in the middle of the sentence.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Χρησιμοποιούνται πρώτα οι δωρεάν αντιγραφές ασφαλείας. Θα ανανεωθεί αυτόματα <1>στις {{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'on' was left in English instead of being translated to Spanish ('el').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Se utilizan copias de seguridad gratuitas primero. Se renovarán automáticamente <1>el {{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'backups' is translated as 'արձակումներ' (releases/emissions) instead of 'արտահերթություններ' or 'պահուստային պատճեններ' (backups). Additionally, 'renewed' is translated as 'վերանորոգվելու' (repaired/fixed) instead of 'վերականգնվելու' (renewed/restored).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Անվճար պահուստային պատճեններն օգտագործվում են առաջինը։ Ավտոմատ կերպով կվերականգնվի <1>{{date}}</1>։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The closing tag </1> is missing in the Japanese translation, which will break the React Trans component rendering.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 無料のバックアップが最初に使用されます。自動的に<1>{{date}}</1>に更新されます

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The opening tag <1> is missing before the {{date}} variable.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 무료 백업이 먼저 사용됩니다. <1>{{date}}</1>에 자동으로 갱신됩니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'ຈະຕໍ່ອາຍອັດອັດໂດຍອັດໂນມັດ' contains a typo/repetition error ('ອາຍອັດອັດ' instead of 'ອາຍຸ'). It should be 'ຕໍ່ອາຍຸອັດຕະໂນມັດ'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ການສຳຮອງຂໍ້ມູນຟຣີຈະຖືກນຳໃຊ້ກ່ອນ. ຈະຕໍ່ອາຍຸອັດຕະໂນມັດ <1>ໃນວັນທີ {{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation uses 'datumu {{date}}' (date {{date}}), which is grammatically incorrect and redundant. In Latvian, the preposition 'on' is typically expressed by the date itself or 'X datumā'. The current phrasing 'Tiek automātiski atjaunotas <1>datumu {{date}}</1>' is nonsensical.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bezmaksas atsargkopijas tiek izmantotas pirmās. Tiek automātiski atjaunotas <1>{{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The opening tag <1> is missing in the Russian translation. Only the closing tag </1> is present.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: В первую очередь используются бесплатные резервные копии. Автоматическое продление — <1>{{date}}</1>.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Zgodnih kopičastih podatkov se uporabi najprej' is grammatically incorrect and semantically awkward in Slovenian. 'Zgodnih' is not the correct adjective for 'Free' in this context (should be 'Brezplačnih'), and the sentence structure is unnatural.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Najprej se uporabijo brezplačne varnostne kopije. Samodejna obnovitev bo <1>dne {{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Serbian translation adds the word 'dan' (day) before the date variable, which will result in a redundant or grammatically incorrect string like 'dan 01.01.2024' instead of the intended 'on 01.01.2024'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Koriste se besplatne rezervne kopije. Automatski će biti obnovljeno <1>{{date}}</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The opening tag <1> is missing before the {{date}} variable. The closing tag </1> is present, but the tag pair is incomplete.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Öncelikle ücretsiz yedeklemeler kullanılır. <1>{{date}}</1> tarihinde otomatik olarak yenilenecektir.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation adds the word 'дата' (date) inside the tag, which changes the meaning from 'renewed on [date]' to 'renewed [date] date'. In Ukrainian, the preposition 'on' is implied by the date itself, and adding 'дата' makes the sentence grammatically incorrect and redundant.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Спочатку використовуються безкоштовні резервні копії. Будуть автоматично поновлені <1>{{date}}</1>
